lines.speaker: Captain Ginea
lines.text: I'm busy here. Do you need something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Please tell me about what you're doing.

lines.speaker: Captain Ginea
lines.text: Gangs. It's the gangs from the slums in the east. Those ruffians are always hatching schemes, whether it's smuggling or extortion or even plain street violence.

lines.speaker: Captain Ginea
lines.text: I'm in charge of the investigations unit. Sometimes an informant will let us know when a gang is meeting. Then we can send in the troops and get them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I help?

lines.speaker: Captain Ginea
lines.text: That would be very welcome. Information about gang meetings is written on the notice board when it's received. When you see a meeting announced there, go and deal with 'em.

lines.speaker: Captain Ginea
lines.text: If they drop any documents, bring them to me for an extra reward.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You sound busy. I'll be off.

lines.speaker: Captain Ginea
lines.text: Hello again. Thanks for offering to help deal with the criminal gangs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know of any meetings now?

lines.speaker: Captain Ginea
lines.text: No, not at the moment. Keep checking the notice board - information is written there when we receive it.

lines.speaker: Captain Ginea
lines.text: We've received reports of a gang [in location]! They're meeting [in location].

lines.speaker: Captain Ginea
lines.text: We believe the meeting is in progress now.

lines.speaker: Captain Ginea
lines.text: We believe the meeting is about to start imminently.

lines.speaker: Captain Ginea
lines.text: We believe the meeting will start in about [number] minutes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Remind me, what do I do for this?

lines.speaker: Captain Ginea
lines.text: Gang meeting information is written on the notice board when it's received from the informants. When you see a meeting announced there, go and deal with 'em.

lines.speaker: Captain Ginea
lines.text: If they drop any documents, bring them to me for an extra reward.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll be off.

sections.title: Checking the information board before talking to her

lines.speaker: Captain Ginea
lines.text: Come over here and talk to me before you mess around with that.

lines.speaker: Captain Ginea
lines.text: No thanks, I don't need that.

lines.speaker: Captain Ginea
lines.text: Thank you. This will help us track down more gang meetings in future.

lines.speaker: Captain Ginea
lines.text: I don't remember asking you to help, but... okay, thank you, whoever you are.

sections.title: If the player does not have enough favour

lines.speaker: Captain Ginea
lines.text: Please leave. There is confidential information in here, and you are not authorised to view it.
